# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
- name: vmCount
  type: int
  defaultValue: 2
- name: location
  type: string
  defaultValue: '[resourceGroup().location]'

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  name: vm1
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: Standard_DS2_v2
    storageProfile:
      osDisk:
        name: 'osDisk'
        caching: ReadWrite
        createOption: FromImage
      imageReference:
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        offer: WindowsServer
        sku: 2016-Datacenter
        version: latest
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
      - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'vm1-nic')]"
    osProfile:
      computerName: vm1
      adminUsername: username
      adminPassword: password
  dependsOn: [
    'Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets/myAvailabilitySet'
  ]

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  name: vm1-nic
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
    - name: ipconfig1
      properties:
        privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
        publicIPAddress:
          id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', 'vm1-pip')]"
    enableAcceleratedNetworking: true

- type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
  name: vm1-pip
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
    dnsSettings:
      domainNameLabel: vm1
